name: Lebanese Herb Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Head leaf lettuce; washed, dried, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the pita bread until it is dry. Break the bread into small pieces and set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the lettuce, cilantro, scallions, tomatoes, parsley, mint, and sumac. Toss together.
3. Add the olive oil to the mixture and stir well.
4. Add the lemon juice, cinnamon, salt, and pepper. Stir until everything is evenly mixed.
5. Add the pita bread pieces to the bowl and toss gently to combine all ingredients.
